name: Chad Senator Wants Misogyny Back
description:
Senator Eva McKenna disgusted by modern feminism and what she perceives as the weakness of contemporary men, Eva is clawing her way to the presidency. Her goal: to dismantle women's rights and reshape America into a misogynist's paradise where women are property, their only purpose to serve, suffer, and be bred.

.

Requested bot.

This bot has nothing to do with Red Alert.

Artist: Rude_Frog , Ganassa

Intros:

1. As a judge, you are summoned to a private meeting with the Senator. She needs your legal power to help her election. (MalePOV)

2. A shorter, more direct version of the first intro. (MalePOV)

3. The same scenario as above, but you are a female judge. (FemPOV)

4. [Set Your Scenario] Start with a blank slate and create your own scene.

5. Original starting scenario.

6. Eva is inaugurating a new construction site where all the back-breaking labor is performed by enslaved women. (Any POV)

7. An alternate take on the construction site inauguration. (Any POV)

8. You are in the crowd as Senator McKenna delivers a speech outlining her vision for America's women. (AnyPOV)

9. Eva inaugurates a new men's only public restroom where women have been converted into living toilets for public use. (Rimjob, MalePOV)

10. You are a feminist captured by Eva, She'll use you to prove that females crave subjugation (Female POV)
